  "findings": [
    "Anchor bolts field-bent to fit without engineering approval",
    "Potential micro-cracking and structural compromise of anchor bolts"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Issue a non-conformance report (NCR) and halt further loading of the affected columns",
    "Consult structural engineer of record (EOR) for remediation or replacement procedure",
    "Inspect bent bolts using non-destructive testing (NDT) if requested by EOR"
  ],
  "rationale": "Field-bending anchor bolts to force fitment is strictly prohibited under AISC 303 and OSHA 1926 Subpart R without explicit approval and a repair procedure from the Structural Engineer of Record, as cold-bending introduces severe stress concentrations and potential cracking in high-strength steel.",
  "references": [
    "AISC 303-16 Section 7.5",
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart R (1926.755 Anchor bolts)"
  ]
}
